```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
outpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "outputs")
plotpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "plots")
```

```{r}
tjd <- read_table(here(outpath, "58-Sceloporus_50kb_tajimad_pop9.Tajima.D"))
fst <- read_table(here(outpath, "58-Sceloporus_50kb_fst_pop9pop6.windowed.weir.fst"))


```
